hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then cd "$ROOT" && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>&1 && uv run mypy backend/src 2>&1; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.ts ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *.gen.ts ]]; then cd "$ROOT/frontend" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; fi'
cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && uv run pytest -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20
